creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 223061
Updated patch file

(In reply to Danilo G. Baio from comment #2)

When I updated security/py-certbot to 1.12.0, I found certbot.1 wasn't generated and resulted in post-install stage error. But it seems to be bug of 1.12.0 and fixed in 1.13.0. So I updated patch to reflect it.
